The '''''Allecto''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] in the service of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
The ''Allecto'' rendezvoused with a shuttle carrying [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Tarkin]] during a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] attack in the early days of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]''
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter]]'' {{1st}} {{C|Simulator appearance only}}
